### 49th Annual Atlanta Jazz Festival

Atlanta, Georgia \| Piedmont Park \| May 23-25, 2026

[View Lineup](https://atljazzfest.com/#lineup)

## FREE & OPEN TO THE PUBLIC

Atlanta Jazz Festival is funded through the support of corporate sponsorships as well as Atlanta Jazz Festival, Inc., a non-profit entity dedicated to preserving the legacy of the Atlanta Jazz Festival.

About Atlanta Jazz Festival

Atlanta Jazz Festival is regarded as one of the largest FREE jazz festivals in the country. An annual celebration of the music, culture and art of jazz begins in April and culminates each Memorial Day weekend, with an outdoor festival featuring jazz artists from all over the world.

The mission of the Atlanta Jazz Festival is to expose and entertain a diverse audience of Jazz aficionados, young Jazz enthusiasts and aspiring musicians to the rich heritage and variety of Jazz as an authentic form of American music.

Atlanta Jazz Festival is produced by the [City of Atlanta Mayor’s Office of Cultural Affair](https://ocaatlanta.com/)

### “Life is not about finding our limitations, it’s about finding our infinity.”   \- Herbie Hancock

## Submit YOUR EVENT

[31 Days of Jazz Event Submission](https://forms.gle/uTinRKrFGieWwSFB7)

## 31 DAYS OF JAZZ

In celebration of everything jazz, the Atlanta Jazz Festival presents the 31 Days of Jazz event series.

Throughout the month of May, enjoy a specially curated collection of jazz events from festival partners hosted throughout metro Atlanta.

From rooftop concerts and galleries to museums and restaurants, the “Summer of Jazz” series will provide a little something for everyone.

[VIEW EVENT CALENDAR](https://atljazzfest.com/event-calendar/)
